title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos class model, which achieves top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The video reviews its capabilities across memory, vision, website testing, fullstack apps, and CAD.
writeup: Better Stack covers the release of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, described as the first Mythos class model, and walks through its reported results on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The review tests the model across memory, vision, website testing, fullstack app building, and CAD. The takeaway is a capability snapshot: top benchmark performance paired with hands-on trials spanning coding, perception, and design tasks.
